title: July 17th, 2021 (2)
body:
- daily notes
    - akabilly
    - professional
        - lyrics for chambered
            - mf doom
            - but my mask is a black block on zoom
            - when they ask what i'm doing
            - i ease into it
            -   intuit what they mean and toss it back to em
            - plain and simple
            - muting as soon as i can
            - playing with symbols
            - a mutant shaping sounds with my hands
            - i'm praying with cymbals
            - hunting for something sacrificial
            - so when i kill it
            - y'all blessed by what i give you
            - a ronin known for goin in alone an hoping an opening shows up in time for me to go home an hone a homing pigeon prone to pidgin with a poem to pitch in a hymn to hum and a throne for shittin shoulda shown the vision if you didn't want one bad throw to pitch it jesusin the tempo upend the pitcher downsample the scripture crush the competition stretch the bars to fit ya then reminisce over when it was all so simple i was an awesome person with perfect dimples until something awful happened my people called em pimples then i kept picking at em when i needed something to get back into i was an august person in the middle of winter thawed autumn people were too temperate cooled me to my center fooled me into censured thinking i needed a new flame to enter the chamber of my true name homie i came from the placenta you rang you needed a place to stay you're the renter but i'm no landlord or lender what's not addressed properly simply returns to sender
            - drip tigran
            - porkestra
    - professional
